heading: Swine packer marketing contracts offered to producers
label: 198a Swine packer marketing contracts offered to producers
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section by , see Livestock Mandatory Reporting note set out under .section 942 of Pub. L. 106–78section 1635 of this title
Termination DateSection to terminate , see , set out in a Livestock Mandatory Reporting note under .Mar. 14, 2025section 942 of Pub. L. 106–78section 1635 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations to carry out this section, the Secretary shall establish and maintain a library or catalog of each type of contract offered by packers to swine producers for the purchase of all or part of the producers’ production of swine (including swine that are purchased or committed for delivery), including all available noncarcass merit premiums.

children.heading: Availability
children.label: b Availability
children.text: The Secretary shall make available to swine producers and other interested persons information on the types of contracts described in subsection (a), including notice (on a real-time basis if practicable) of the types of contracts that are being offered by each individual packer to, and are open to acceptance by, producers for the purchase of swine.

children.heading: Confidentiality
children.label: c Confidentiality
children.text: The reporting requirements under subsections (a) and (b) shall be subject to the confidentiality protections provided under .section 1636 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: obtain (by a filing or other procedure required of each individual packer) information indicating what types of contracts for the purchase of swine are available from each packer; and

children.label: B
children.text: make the information available in a monthly report to swine producers and other interested persons.

children.label: A
children.text: the types of existing contracts for each packer;

children.label: B
children.text: the provisions contained in each contract that provide for expansion in the numbers of swine to be delivered under the contract for the following 6-month and 12-month periods;

children.label: C
children.text: an estimate of the total number of swine committed by contract for delivery to all packers within the 6-month and 12-month periods following the date of the report, reported by reporting region and by type of contract; and

children.label: D
children.text: an estimate of the maximum total number of swine that potentially could be delivered within the 6-month and 12-month periods following the date of the report under the provisions described in subparagraph (B) that are included in existing contracts, reported by reporting region and by type of contract.

children.heading: Violations
children.label: e Violations
children.text: It shall be unlawful and a violation of this subchapter for any packer to willfully fail or refuse to provide to the Secretary accurate information required under, or to willfully fail or refuse to comply with any requirement of, this section.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as necessary to carry out this section.
